_note_schema: This manifest uses ERC-8004 field conventions for discoverability, but this agent does not perform full ERC-8004 on-chain identity registration.
name: Veiled Oracle
description: Request-triggered agent that uses Venice AI no-data-retention inference to analyze sensitive on-chain data privately, producing verifiable public verdicts and storing full reports via x402 services on Base.

operator.name: Omniacs DAO
operator._note_wallet: Placeholder — populated at deploy time via the WALLET_ADDRESS environment variable.

identity._note: The agent transacts on Base using USDC via the x402 protocol. No ERC-8004 registry entry exists on-chain.

tools.name: etherscan-v2
tools.purpose: Ethereum on-chain balance and transaction data

tools.name: blockscout-base
tools.purpose: Base on-chain balance, token, and transaction data

execution_model.autonomy: Within a single request the agent autonomously fetches data, runs inference, and publishes outputs. It does not self-initiate work.

guardrails.privacy_guarantee: Venice no-data-retention — sensitive data never stored, logged, or trained on
guardrails.output_storage: Plain text on x402-pastebin, retrievable by token
